sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33529" key="e)legci/gamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεγξίγᾰμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n33529.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">testing a wife's fidelity</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ποταμός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.125</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
